get_merge_request.title: Document the new CSV export feature in the analyst guide
get_merge_request.description:
## What & why

Adds a section to the analyst guide explaining how to use the new "Download CSV"
button, with a screenshot and a note about the row-limit. Pure documentation change.

No Jira card — this is an ad-hoc docs follow-up to a feature that already shipped, it
was never ticketed.

## How to test

1. `npm run docs:dev`
2. Open `/guides/analyst#csv-export` and confirm the new section renders with the screenshot.

## Proof it was run

Screenshot of the rendered guide page with the new section:

![rendered analyst guide](https://acme.gitlab.io/uploads/analyst-guide-csv.png)

## Notes for reviewer

Prose + one screenshot asset only; no application code touched.
get_merge_request.commit_summary: 1 commit: add CSV export section to analyst guide

get_merge_request_file_diff.docs/guides/analyst.md:
@@ -120,6 +120,43 @@
+## Exporting to CSV
+
+Click the **Download CSV** button on the reports dashboard to export the current
+filtered view. The export respects the active date filter.
+
+![CSV export button](../assets/csv-export.png)
